{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322021443900FE953BA194219FD2E"}"},"total":32},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615560663016162110","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看了番茄上许多的综漫文了，这一本基本上可以排我心目中的上游了（众所周知看番茄的小说不能带脑子），没啥毒点，整体上是OK的。就是感觉读者有点少[什么]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773138626,"group_id":"7609589678412401689","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿心似剑斩愁思","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ZtAMVfGG9ENhonR7V76wzn3McAyFl8dt9xPIddfKYn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8548f739f5e94fecb98f0868982cd41b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708451&x-signature=nSYQonin7Ip47KLq%2FNijpTIneUw%3D","user_id":"2278605307261295","user_name":"离春去"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2278605307261295","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609589678412401689","book_info":{"abstract":"（签到系统，春物+路人女主+孤独摇滚+迷途之子+欢乐颂人偶+GBC，其余暂定）
身处综漫世界的羽川仁，在父母因车祸去世的时候伤心欲绝觉醒了前世宿慧，更觉醒了“签到系统”。
签到系统在遇到各个女主角的时候就可以出发特殊签到。
不过这个特殊签到的条件是怎么回事？
一级特殊签到要朋友关系，二级特殊签到竟然就要接吻？三级特殊签到的要求竟然是上垒？
对不起了英梨梨，雪乃，结衣，虹夏，波奇，素世..........不是我想做渣男，是系统逼我做的，我是一个好男人！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od4abfad912f8b5ab793050092ed9a460~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孤独落日","author_id":"","book_id":"7609589678412401689","book_name":"综漫，我也不想当渣男啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c8c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609589717763359257","read_count":"17212","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"195424"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"92","tags":"动漫衍生,综漫,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od4abfad912f8b5ab793050092ed9a460~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300884&x-signature=zDA0XpRHG6y8j72MDxdPOeA%2BWGA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1666481110660280","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322021443900FE953BA194219FD2E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5226,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1334},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612278679901176638","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以的
